OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the stream connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_ID.description: The ID of the live stream to connect to.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_LISTEN_DELETE.description: Whether to listen for delete events on the live stream.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_NO_DEPENDENCIES.description: Whether to ignore dependencies when processing events from the live stream.

MICROSOFT_GRAPH_SECURITY_INTEL_LOGIN_URL.description: The Microsoft login URL for authentication.

MICROSOFT_GRAPH_SECURITY_INTEL_BASE_URL.description: The Microsoft Graph API base URL.

MICROSOFT_GRAPH_SECURITY_INTEL_RESOURCE_.description: The API resource path for threat intelligence indicators.

MICROSOFT_GRAPH_SECURITY_INTEL_EXPIRE_TI.description: The expiration time in days for threat intelligence indicators.

MICROSOFT_GRAPH_SECURITY_INTEL_ACTION.description: The action to apply to indicators (e.g., alert, block, allow).

MICROSOFT_GRAPH_SECURITY_INTEL_TLP_LEVEL.description: The TLP level to apply to indicators.

MICROSOFT_GRAPH_SECURITY_INTEL_PASSIVE_O.description: Whether to set indicators as passive only.
